rules.My Will Be Done: 6" Aura, this model and target unit may reroll 1's To Hit.
rules.Relentless March: 6" Aura, this model and target unit gain M+2.
rules.Improved Living Metal: This model Heals +1 Wound in your Command Phase. This overrides the base Living Metal Rule.
rules.United in Destruction: 6" Aura, this model and target unit may reroll 1's To Wound.
rules.Mind in the Machine: In the shooting phase, target a nonTitanic Vehicle model within 24" and shoot one weapon of your choice. You are allowed to target models friendly to the Vehicle, but not itself.
rules.Empyric Overcharge: 12" Aura, target Psyker suffers Perils of the Warp on all Doubles as if they were both 1's. This does not modify the To Cast value or prevent Casting in any way. This Aura is cast before the Cast Rolls happen.
rules.Mechanical Augmentation: 6" Aura, target unit gains 1 randomized result. The same unit may benefit from this ability multiple times, but each result may only apply to the same target unit once each. Duplicate results have no effect. D3. 1 S+1, 2 A+1, 3 BS-1 (Improves by 1).
rules.Lord of Technology: 6" Aura, target unit gains +1 to reanimation Rolls. This can never become better then a +1, but rerolls may still apply.
rules.Nullstone Field Generator: 6" Aura, this model and target unit gain a 5+ Invulnerability Save.
rules.Destroyer Madness: 12" True Aura, this model and every friendly Necron model suffers Ld-2. In each of your Command Phases, each affected model takes a Ld Test. If they fail, they must Move towards the closest enemy model, may only Shoot or Advance towards it so long as they are not in Charge range, and Declare Charges against the closest enemy model.
rules.Only Moderately Insane: this model does not suffer any Ld penalties when taking its Destroyer Madness Test.
rules.Lord of Destruction: 6" Aura, this model and target unit may reroll all failed To Hit and Wound rolls in Melee.
rules.Writhing Bodies: This model is considered to be equipped with Grenades for the purposes of Charging units in Cover.
rules.Writhing Bodie: This model is considered to be equipped with Grenades for the purposes of Charging units in Cover.
rules.Counter Tactics: 6" Aura, this model and target unit gain all of the Special Rules from target unit within 24", excluding Wargear.
rules.Counter Tactic: 6" Aura, this model and target unit gain all of the Special Rules from target unit within 24", excluding Wargear.
rules.Adaptive Strategy: 6" Aura, this model and friendly target unit may swap Rapid Fire # for Assault #.
rules.Prescient Strike: 6" Aura, this model and target unit have I10.
rules.The Stars are Right: In each of your Command Phases, roll a die. If the result is equal to or less then the current turn number, Orikan uses the Stars are Right Stat Line instead of the Orikan Stat Line. Orikan fully heals when he transforms.
rules.Surrogate Hosts: when this model is destroyed, on a 2+ swap it with a friendly Infantry model within 6" Instead with d3 Wounds restored. This replaced Reanimation
rules.Surrogate Host: when this model is destroyed, on a 2+ swap it with a friendly Infantry model within 6" Instead with d3 Wounds restored. This replaced Reanimation
rules.Psionic Shockwave: All Characters and Independent Characters slain by this model explode in a S4 AP- in a 6" Radius. This does not affect friendly models.
rules.Living Lightning: Each time this model suffers a Wound after Saves and Feel No Pains in melee, inflict 1 Mortal Wound on the unit that inflicted it.
rules.Psychokinesis: This model may Deny the Witch as if it were Psychic Mastery Level 2.
rules.Psychokinesi: This model may Deny the Witch as if it were Psychic Mastery Level 2.
rules.Nanoscarabs: Repair 1 Wound on Target unit within 3". On a 5+, repair one Disabled Weapon, Crew Stun, Immobilize, or Weapon Destroyed result. M+6 and Fly. 6" Aura, target Canoptek Unit gains +1 To Hit.
rules.Nanoscarab: Repair 1 Wound on Target unit within 3". On a 5+, repair one Disabled Weapon, Crew Stun, Immobilize, or Weapon Destroyed result. M+6 and Fly. 6" Aura, target Canoptek Unit gains +1 To Hit.
rules.Vanquish the Living: 6" Aura, this model and target unit may reroll 1's To Wound.
rules.Cleaving Counterblow: each Melee attack made against Obyron in a Challenge that misses grants Obyron one additional attack at Initiative Step Slow.
rules.Ghostwalk Mantle: At the end of your Movement Phase you may remove Vargard Obyron and the unit he is joined to and Deepstrike them back onto the Table. If Deepstriking within 12" Of Nemesor Zahndrekh do not scatter. One Use Only.
rules.Their Number is Legion: this model may reroll 1's To Reanimate.
rules.Monster Escort: This model may join Monster or Monstrous Infantry units as if it were an Independent Character.
rules.Reanimation Beam: 6" Aura, target Infantry or Monstrous Infantry unit gains 5+ Feel No Pain.
rules.War Construct: This model does not count as a Monster for Poisoned weapons.
rules.Broadside: Each set of 5 Linked Gauss Flayers may only fire out one side each as if they were Hull Mounted on a Vehicle.
rules.Never Stop Firing: this model may fire into Melee. All misses automatically hit friendly units involved in the Melee, selected at random if there is more than one.
rules.Targeting Relay: 6" Aura, this unit and target unit may reroll 1's To Hit.
rules.Agents of the Silent King: This is cast as a unit. This model does not suffer the Autowounds from losing Combat Resolution as a Fearless model. If a friendly Necron unit within 6" fails Combat Resolution and does not pass their Ld Test, instead of suffering Autowounds remove one model from the game (no Reanimation) and the unit is considered to have passed the test. Canoptek units are immune to this rule.
rules.Clog the Barrels: Any enemy non-Titanic Monster, Vehicle, or Monstrous Infantry may not fire weapons at any other target except this one while they are engaged in Melee to it. Flame weapons ignore this.
rules.Clog the Barrel: Any enemy non-Titanic Monster, Vehicle, or Monstrous Infantry may not fire weapons at any other target except this one while they are engaged in Melee to it. Flame weapons ignore this.
rules.Wrath Form: This model has a 4+ Invulnerability Save
rules.Phase Generator: This model ignores Terrain and models when moving. It may not end its movement in a place it cannot occupy or end up in Melee unless it did so by Charging successfully.
rules.Invasion Beam: Teleporter. This model has a Transport Capacity of 20, but instead of carrying the models it keeps them in Reserve. Any model with a Teleporter rule may bring up to its Transport capacity to the field each Turn. The Invasion Beam may Deepstrike the models anywhere along the flight path it moved this turn without Scattering. Each model deployed this way must take a Dangerous Terrain test.
rules.Repair Barge: 6" Aura, target unit gains +1 to Reanimation Rolls. This can never surpass 4+ by any means.
rules.Necrodermis: 4+ Invulnerability Save. Explodes on a 4+ S6 AP1+ d6" Radius
rules.Necrodermi: 4+ Invulnerability Save. Explodes on a 4+ S6 AP1+ d6" Radius
rules.Dread: 12" Aura, target unit must make a Fear Test
rules.Grand Illusion: After Deployment, but before Infiltrators are placed, redeploy d3 of your units. Immune to Natural Law - Ignores models and Terrain for moving. May not fire Overwatch with C'Tan Powers. This model ignores the extra Wound it suffers from Monsterbane.
rules.Death: Each time this model is nominated to fight in Melee, it inflicts an Autowound with AP2+ on each model in base contact, friend or foe.
rules.Gaze of Death: In the Shooting Phase, you may target a unit within 12". The unit takes a Ld test on 3d6, dropping the lowest die. For each point the Ld test failed by, the unit suffers an Autowound with AP2+. This overrides the normal AP- of Autowounds. If this does any Wounds to the target, the Nightbringer Heals 1 Wound as an exception to the normal Heal rules. Immune to Natural Law - Ignores models and Terrain for moving. May not fire Overwatch with C'Tan Powers. This model ignores the extra Wound it suffers from Monsterbane.
rules.Matter Absorption: Each time a Vehicle or Titanic Vehicle is destroyed within 18" of this unit roll a d6. On a 2+, heal 1 Wound. This is an exception to the normal Heal rules. Immune to Natural Law - Ignores models and Terrain for moving. May not fire Overwatch with C'Tan Powers. This model ignores the extra Wound it suffers from Monsterbane.
rules.Phase Shift Generator: 6" Aura, this model and target unit gain 5+ Invulnerability Save.
rules.Grav Pulse: 12" True Aura. Only Use during your Shooting Phase. All Flying and High Altitude models in range except this model, friend and foe, suffer a S10 AP2+ Auto Hit with Monsterbane. This ability does not work if the Obelisk has been reduced to M0. If any Flying or High Altitude models enter this Aura, they are Hit as if it were your Shooting Phase. They will still be hit in your Shooting Phase.
rules.Massive Battery Unit: This model explodes on a 4+ when destroyed. If this model does not use its Grav Pulse this Shooting Phase (still triggers if eligible models enter the True Aura), you may fire each Tesla Sphere twice this Shooting Phase.
rules.Star God Forcefield: 5+ Invulnerability Save. This model explodes on a 4+.
rules.Eternity Portal: Teleporter. This model has a Transport Capacity of 20, but instead of carrying the models it keeps them in Reserve. Any model with a Teleporter rule may bring up to its Transport capacity to the field each Turn. Access Front.
rules.Particle Focus: Any number of Monoliths within range and firing arcs of their Particle Whips to the Doomsday Monolith may forgo their shooting with their particle whips. For each shot given up, the Gauss Obliterator may fire an additional time.
rules.Particle Focu: Any number of Monoliths within range and firing arcs of their Particle Whips to the Doomsday Monolith may forgo their shooting with their particle whips. For each shot given up, the Gauss Obliterator may fire an additional time.
rules.Monolith Vault: This model may carry up to 3 Monoliths as a Transport. They may deploy up to 12" Away.
rules.Defense Field: 6" Aura, this model and target unit gain a 5+ Invulnerability Save
rules.Translocation Protocols: 6" Aura, target unit does not Scatter when Deepstriking
rules.Translocation Protocol: 6" Aura, target unit does not Scatter when Deepstriking
rules.Ziggurat Dock: a Monolith may Dock to the top of the Tomb Ziggurat. Particle Whips that are docked gain S+1, but the Monolith may no longer use its Eternity Gate.
rules.Resurrection Amplifier: 6" Aura, target unit gains +1 to Reanimation Rolls. This can never be improved by more then +1.

wargear.Canoptek Plasmacyte: 6" Aura, target unit with Hardwired for Destruction Rule gains S+1, A+1. Roll a d6. On a 1, one model with this rule is removed from the game. It cannot reanimate or return in any form.
wargear.Chronometron: 6" Aura, this model and target unit gain a 5+ Invulnerability Save.
wargear.Countertemporal Nanomines: 18" Aura, target unit only charges and advances at half speed.
wargear.Cryptogeometric Adjuster: 18" Aura, target unit only charges and advances at half speed.
wargear.Dimensional Sanctum: This model and its unit gain Deepstrike.
wargear.Gloom Prism: May attempt one Deny the Witch per Psychic Phase at Psychic Mastery Level 0.
wargear.Hyper Material Ablator: 6" Aura, target unit gains a 5+ Cover Save.
wargear.Mind Shackle Scarabs: 6" Aura, target non-Titanic model in a Challenge with this model suffers -1 To Hit.
wargear.Phase Shifter Generator: This model gains a 4+ Invulnerability Save.
wargear.Photon Transubjector: This model ignores the First Wound Suffered per Phase
wargear.Prismatic Obfuscatron: 6" Aura, this model and target unit may only be targeted if they are the closest unit to the attacker.
wargear.Resurrection Orb: 6" Aura, this model and one unit within 6" may roll Reanimation twice in your Command Phase. One Use Only.
wargear.Sepulchral Scarabs: Each of your Command Phases roll d6. On a 5+, Heal one additional Wound. This ignores the normal Heal rules.
wargear.Timesplinter Mantle: This model gains a 4+ Invulnerability Save.

rules.name: Conquerors
rules.description: All Infantry models in this army gain Objective Secured.

rules.name: Flayer Virus
rules.description: All models in this army suffer Ld-2.

rules.name: Leaderless
rules.description: Each model only counts as half a model for the purposes of Contesting and Claiming Objective Markers.

rules.name: Infighting
rules.description: No unit can ever have more than one Character or Independent Character joined at any given time, or any Aura from more than one Necron Character or Independent Character affecting them at any given time. The Power of the Stars: All weapons that are not Tesla have the Rending special rule. If a model already had Rending, it may trigger on a 4+ instead of a 5+. This does not affect Auto Wounds or any other Wound that does not have a Roll To Wound. Necron Vehicles explode on a 4+ from this Dynasty.

rules.name: Abundant Precious Metals
rules.description: Models in this army may reroll 1s on Armour Saves.

rules.name: Yearn for Pure Light Forms
rules.description: All models gain Fleet but cannot Claim or Contest Objective Markers.

rules.name: Treasure Horde
rules.description: All models in your army have Objective Secured for Objective Markers within your Deployment Zone.

rules.name: Isolationists
rules.description: Your models cannot Claim or Contest Objective Markers inside the Enemy Deployment Zone.

rules.name: Ferric's Blight
rules.description: All models from this Dynasty suffer Sv+1, resulting in 1 worse Armour Save. This does not affect Unique Characters.

rules.name: Blood Crazed
rules.description: All models in your army gain Shock Assault and Furious Charge. This does not affect Unique Characters.

rules.name: Dark Origins
rules.description: All models have I1, regardless of their Datasheet. Unique Characters are not affected by this.

rules.name: Blackstone Experts
rules.description: Each unit of Infantry may attempt to Deny the Witch once per Round.

rules.name: King's Chosen
rules.description: Every Infantry and Monstrous Infantry model has Bodyguard.

rules.name: Aggressive Territory Grab
rules.description: Models count as 2 models for the purposes of Contesting and Claiming Objective Markers that are not in an enemy Deployment Zone. Units eligible to declare charges must do so. They may still nominate to fire their weapons or advance, even if this invalidates the chance to Declare a Charge.

rules.name: Slavers
